signals.title: ISS repair spacewalk highlights concerns about station health
signals.summary:
NASA astronauts on the International Space Station are preparing for a spacewalk to repair a robotic arm as advisers raise concerns about the long-term health of the station and spacesuits. 
 The post  ISS repair spacewalk highlights concerns about station health  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Starlink veterans launch startup to broaden megaconstellation ownership
signals.summary:
Former SpaceX engineers who helped build and scale Starlink have launched a startup aiming to deliver megaconstellations for governments and companies seeking more control over space-based infrastructure. 
 The post  Starlink veterans launch startup to broaden megaconstellation ownership  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: UN secretary general urges AI giants to disclose environmental impact
signals.summary: António Guterres called on artificial intelligence companies to commit to powering every data center with renewable energy by 2030.

signals.title: ON Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
signals.summary: ON Semiconductor said the deal bumps up its total addressable market by $30 billion, to $243 billion by 2030.

signals.title: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies'
signals.summary: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," President Donald Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.

signals.title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
signals.summary: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.

signals.title: Lockheed Martin wins over $35 billion contract to quadruple THAAD production
signals.summary: As U.S. lawmakers worry over the munitions stockpile, Lockheed Martin announced a multiyear contract to increase THAAD production from 96 to 400 a year.

signals.title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
signals.summary: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.

signals.title: House backs $1.55 billion to revive E-7 Wedgetail, spares Navy Hawkeye
signals.summary: The White House budget office wants to raid a Navy radar-plane account and a classified Air Force line to pull the E-7 Wedgetail back from the dead.

signals.title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump says Tehran violated ceasefire agreement
House Appropriations Committee approves $55.5 billion for U.S. Space Force
signals.summary:
Committee urges more competition in satellite communications and criticizes reliance on reconciliation to fund Golden Dome 
 The post  House Appropriations Committee approves $55.5 billion for U.S. Space Force  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Canceled NASA exploration projects suffered billions of dollars in overruns
signals.summary:
Four NASA exploration projects that the agency stopped earlier this year had suffered overruns that saw their costs more than double, with more than $1 billion in additional increases expected. 
 The post  Canceled NASA exploration projects suffered billions of dollars in overruns  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: NGSO trade association launches without industry giant SpaceX
signals.summary:
Amazon and several other non-geostationary satellite operators have formed a trade association to represent their fast-growing market, with SpaceX notably absent despite having by far the largest NGSO constellation. 
 The post  NGSO trade association launches without industry giant SpaceX  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Ex-Trump advisor John Bolton pleads guilty to retaining national defense information
signals.summary: John Bolton is one of several foes of President Donald Trump who has been indicted since Trump regained the White House.

signals.title: NATO allies promised Trump they’d secure the Arctic; they’ve got work to do
signals.summary: Through most of NATO’s eight-decade history, the inhospitable High North was low priority. That calculus is now changing.

signals.title: The housing bill’s back on track to becoming law. Here’s what it does for affordability.
signals.summary: A bipartisan housing package appears once again close to becoming U.S. law, albeit with a delay after President Donald Trump canceled a signing ceremony for the legislation on Wednesday.

signals.title: Trump eases pressure on Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh as inflation tops 4%
signals.summary: President Donald Trump's economic advisors are giving Warsh space, as the new Fed chairman, on interest rates as the president repeats calls to cut.

signals.title: Walmart heir Lukas Walton buys minority stake in the Chicago Bulls and United Center
signals.summary: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and his wife, Samantha, are residents of Chicago.

signals.title: Micron sinks 6%, wrapping a wild week of trading that saw big swings
signals.summary: Micron Technology's shares tumbled on Friday amid a global sell-off in chip stocks.

signals.title: Space Force seeks fresh bidders for satellite-control antennas
signals.summary:
After terminating $1.7 billion contract, Space Force to relaunch SCAR 
 The post  Space Force seeks fresh bidders for satellite-control antennas  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: York satellite demonstrates two-way UHF communications from low Earth orbit
signals.summary:
WASHINGTON — York Space Systems said June 24 that a satellite it built for the U.S. Space Force successfully demonstrated two-way tactical communications using ultra-high-frequency (UHF) links from low Earth […] 
 The post  York satellite demonstrates two-way UHF communications from low Earth orbit  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: NASA’s inspector general warns launch sites nearing capacity
signals.summary:
A report by NASA’s inspector general is the latest to highlight the problems that the increasing number of launches is posing to spaceports. 
 The post  NASA’s inspector general warns launch sites nearing capacity  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: The grid operates in seconds, but financial settlement still moves in months
signals.summary: Big Tech is allocating hundreds of billions of dollars for data center expansions; creating reporting frameworks for energy flexibility is the next step, writes Andrii Garanin at Silicon Foundation.

signals.title: Data centers are ready to negotiate flexibility for speed
signals.summary: Hyperscalers want their data centers online and utilities want to provide interconnections, but experts say both are still looking for common operating guidelines.

signals.title: ASHRAE to tackle data centers, thermal systems at annual conference
signals.summary: The engineering society’s annual meeting, starting this weekend in Austin, Texas, will have programs on managing energy costs and integrating energy storage projects, among others.

signals.title: 101st soldiers use drones to drop grappling hooks, breach razor wire
signals.summary: The Army should treat drones like ammo, one officer said, estimating a brigade needs between 1,000 to 1,500 drones per week in sustained combat operations.

signals.title: Romania bolsters Black Sea fleet with Turkish-built corvette
signals.summary: The transfer marks the first delivery of a Turkish-built warship to a European Union and NATO member state, underscoring Turkey’s growing naval exports.

signals.title: Gavin Newsom calls for national billionaires tax: 'It's time for an economic reset'
signals.summary: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said he supports imposing "a true minimum tax on billionaires" and closing "tax-free lifestyle loan" loopholes for the rich.

signals.title: [13F] Berkshire Hathaway (Buffett) — nuovo filing 2009-11-05
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Pershing Square (Ackman) — nuovo filing 2024-07-29
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Scion Asset Mgmt (Burry) — nuovo filing 2023-08-10
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: Trump meets munitions makers amid push to replenish weapons stockpiles
signals.summary: Pentagon negotiators are pressing contractors to move much faster to boost output.

signals.title: California to sue Trump administration over offshore wind buybacks
signals.summary: The lease cancellations “are causing ongoing harm” to California, which has “invested more than $100 million to support the development of wind energy,” the state’s attorney general said.

signals.title: DOE emergency orders are incurring additional costs. What are the benefits?
signals.summary: Some of the generating units have operated during tight grid conditions and may have contributed to reliability. Keeping them running costs about $550 million a year, the Sierra Club says.

signals.title: Europe’s next security challenge is in orbit
signals.summary:
Across the European Union, satellite navigations alone is thought to underpin more than 10% of GDP. Satellite-dependent activity on the whole is responsible for much more. According to INSEE and […] 
 The post  Europe’s next security challenge is in orbit  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: German Counter-drone startup Tytan eyes 3,000 interceptors per month in new factory
signals.summary: Production at the new plant is scheduled to begin in August, according to the company's CEO.

signals.title: Rubio says Israel, Lebanon reach framework agreement aimed at 'lasting peace and security'
signals.summary: Israel and Lebanon agreed to implement a ceasefire. But that is contingent on the paramilitary group Hezbollah agreeing to halt hostilities.

signals.title: OpenAI hasn't held pre-IPO investor meetings or set timeline yet, sources say
signals.summary: OpenAI said it confidentially filed its prospectus with the SEC earlier this month, but noted it "may be a while" before it goes public.

signals.title: OpenAI limits new AI models to 'trusted partners' at request of U.S. government
signals.summary: OpenAI said it previewed the new models' capabilities with the government ahead of the launch.

signals.title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
signals.summary: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.

signals.title: Leon Black refuses to answer questions on NDAs at Jeffrey Epstein hearing, Rep. Comer says
signals.summary: "I knew Jekyll. I didn't know Hyde," Leon Black says about Jeffrey Epstein in his prepared statement to the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.

signals.title: Healthcare stocks have caught fire, sending all 3 of our names to record highs
signals.summary: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

signals.title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
signals.summary: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.

signals.title: Imposter scams led fraud reports to the FTC for fifth straight year in 2025, causing $3.5 billion in losses
signals.summary: The amount lost to imposter scams is part of $15.9 billion in total fraud losses reported to the Federal Trade Commission in 2025

signals.title: The Pentagon’s research infrastructure is ‘deteriorating,’ study finds
signals.summary: Pentagon research has been hampered by backlogged security clearances, limited funds to build or refurbish labs and a slow and difficult hiring process.

signals.title: White House asks Congress for $87.6 billion, mostly for Iran war
signals.summary: The request includes $67.15 billion for the military, including $21 billion for munitions and to strengthen the U.S. industrial base.

signals.title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
Deployable reserves shrinking as coal, gas forced outage rates rise: NERC
signals.summary: Coal and gas generation saw a respective 39.8 TWh and 19.1 TWh increase in unavailable energy in 2025, the North American Electric Reliability Corp. said.

signals.title: A month into EDAM, the data already shows two very different grids
signals.summary: The new Western day-ahead market is starting to show where resource mixes, operating constraints and carbon policies create fundamentally different economic outcomes.

signals.title: Texas landowners seek pause in $2B, 765-kV transmission line case over notice concerns
signals.summary: The Permian Basin power line request says property owners were not properly notified after route changes. The build-out is tied to growing ERCOT grid needs.

signals.title: Weather Stream releases first light imagery from GEMS2 microwave radiometer
signals.summary:
Updated with comments from Weather Stream CEO Michael Hurowitz. SAN FRANCISCO – Weather Stream, a Boulder, Colorado, commercial weather satellite operator, is collecting global atmospheric observations with its GEMS2-Amethyst satellite. […] 
 The post  Weather Stream releases first light imagery from GEMS2 microwave radiometer  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Jeremy Grantham says this is the most expensive market in 'American history'
signals.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.

signals.title: Billionaire investor Jeremy Grantham says bitcoin will 'dwindle away with a whimper'
signals.summary: Jeremy Grantham renewed his long-running criticism of bitcoin, predicting it will gradually fade into irrelevance over decades.

signals.title: Red Lobster's Ultimate Endless Shrimp promotion described as a 'car crash' for the company, lawsuit says
signals.summary: "Thai Union doubled down on a campaign to squeeze out every drop of value that it could," creditors said

signals.title: OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as users shift from 'tokenmaxxing' to efficiency
signals.summary: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.

signals.title: One factor that may be partly behind the S&P 500's curious action this week
signals.summary: There were plenty of reasons for stocks to post a big move on Thursday, but the S&P 500 ended almost exactly where it closed Wednesday.

signals.title: The brands winning with World Cup advertising may not be the sponsors
signals.summary: The World Cup winners and losers in advertising may be indicative of a broader trend of how people are responding to authentic branding.

signals.title: Volkswagen plans to cut 15% of its workforce and close four German plants, report says
signals.summary: Auto giant Volkswagen is reportedly planning to cut 100,000 jobs and end production at four German plants over the coming years.

signals.title: Polymarket annualized revenue surpasses $1 billion six weeks after its U.S. exchange launch
signals.summary: World Cup trading and the end of its U.S. waitlist are driving rapid growth for Polymarket's prediction market platform.

signals.title: Rise in memory chip costs puts pressure on retailers of laptops and smartphones
signals.summary: As the global race for AI moves forward, a shortage of memory chips has begun to drive up prices of consumer electronics and may lead to product shortages.

signals.title: Why breakthrough GLP-1 weight loss pills may be a bad thing for employer insurance coverage
signals.summary: New GLP-1 weight-loss pills from Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly are likely to boost consumer demand, but employer-sponsored health insurance may not foot the bill.

signals.title: 'The cult of Elon': SpaceX investors grapple with volatility amid big swings
signals.summary: SpaceX stock has seen big spikes and drop in its opening two weeks as a public company.

signals.title: Estrogen patches are hard to find, and it may not be resolved any time soon
signals.summary: Estrogen patches are in short supply as demand for menopause treatments skyrockets, and it could take at least a year for manufacturers to catch up.

signals.title: Gen. Christopher Donahue to unexpectedly relinquish command of Army Europe and Africa
signals.summary: U.S. Army Gen. Christopher Donahue will unexpectedly relinquish command next week after just 18 months in the role, the Pentagon confirmed Wednesday.

signals.summary:
The African nation of Botswana is the latest country to sign the Artemis Accords outlining best practices for space exploration.

signals.title: Finding solutions to jamming and spoofing

signals.summary:

signals.title: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
signals.summary: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.

signals.title: Ukraine’s newest strike weapon drifts into Russia on the wind
signals.summary: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.

signals.title: Philippines deploys US-made Triton naval drones in its western waters to scout for intruders
signals.summary: The transfer comes after the military revealed that China discreetly deployed a 6x6 meter floating platform equipped with an antenna at Scarborough Shoal.

signals.title: Europe’s defense build-up depends on getting partnerships right
signals.summary: One pattern is worth watching: Partnership activity is not spreading evenly across the market; it is coalescing around a handful of industrial platforms.

signals.title: ICEYE to double radar-satellite capacity by late 2027 as demand surges
signals.summary: The company's goal is to ramp up production to two satellites a week as it responds to surging demand from European militaries.

signals.title: Poland buys V-BAT drones to boost Baltic Sea naval operations
signals.summary: The deal puts Poland in line to become the first country on NATO’s eastern flank to acquire the Shield AI-made drone.

signals.title: Shield Space and ClearSpace partner to defend satellites from orbital threats
signals.summary:
British startup Shield Space plans to combine its autonomous satellite operations software with ClearSpace’s in-orbit servicing capabilities to address emerging orbital threats.

signals.summary:

signals.title: Vast signs additional partners for commercial space station microgravity research

signals.title: Vantor selects BAE Systems to build next-generation imaging satellites
signals.summary:
WASHINGTON — Vantor has chosen BAE Systems to build its next generation of high-resolution imaging satellites. The selection reunites Vantor with the former Ball Aerospace business that helped develop DigitalGlobe’s […] 
 The post  Vantor selects BAE Systems to build next-generation imaging satellites  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: SpaceX launches secretive Starfall reentry demo mission
signals.summary:
SpaceX launched the first test flight of its Starfall reentry capsule June 23, but the mission remained as secretive as the program itself. 
 The post  SpaceX launches secretive Starfall reentry demo mission  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: OHB raises funding for expansion, acquisitions
signals.summary:
German space company OHB will raise about half a billion euros through a stock sale to allow the company to expand facilities and pursue potential acquisitions. 
 The post  OHB raises funding for expansion, acquisitions  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US, UK, France, Germany raise alarm about Chinese patrols off eastern Taiwan
signals.summary: The countries said Chinese patrols off the coast of Taiwan threaten regional stability and freedom of navigation.

signals.title: China studied US stealth aircraft — and learned the wrong lessons
signals.summary: An Air Force researcher said China's assessments of U.S. stealth capabilities "diverge from technical reality and operational practice."

signals.title: Airstrike killed senior ISIS commander in Syria, CENTCOM says
signals.summary: A senior Islamic State leader was killed by an airstrike last week, Central Command announced on Wednesday.

signals.title: Germany scraps F126 frigate program, pivots to MEKO warships amid cost and contractor chaos
signals.summary: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.

signals.title: Tank maker KNDS plans stock market listing, Germany to buy 40% stake
signals.summary: The firm showed a proposed battle tank at Eurosatory defense exhibition in Paris boasting a French turret and gun mounted on a German Leopard 2 chassis.

signals.title: US Senate joins House in voting to halt Iran war
signals.summary: It marks the first time both chambers approved directing a president to remove armed forces from hostilities since the War Powers Act was adopted in 1973.
